/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/FallingFury.dir/src/core/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FallingFury.dir/src/core/main.cpp.o -o bin/FallingFury -F/Users/tamimorif/Documents/GitHub/Falling-Fury/SFML/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,@executable_path/Frameworks -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/Frameworks -framework sfml-graphics -framework sfml-window -framework sfml-system -framework sfml-audio
